description_long: This is a cylindrical red postbox with a domed top and a black metal handle arching over the lid. The front features a prominent horizontal mail slot with a black flap, positioned above a rectangular access panel with a small lock or latch on the lower right. The surface is painted in a vivid red, showing subtle weathering and texture variations. The back and sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. There are no visible logos or collection time panels, and the overall construction suggests a robust metal body suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A cylindrical red postbox with a domed lid, black handle, and a front-facing mail slot above a rectangular access panel. The surface is weathered and utilitarian, with no visible logos or plaques.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mail slot with black flap and the rectangular access panel with a latch below.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curvature of the body and the attachment of the black handle to the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the arching black handle.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the handle attachment and the side profile of the access panel.
attribute_mail_slot_location: centered on the front face near the top
attribute_door_or_access_panel: rectangular access panel on the lower front with a small latch on the right
attribute_posting_aperture_design: horizontal rectangular slot with a black flap
